text.div:
This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include all codes defined in urn:AuditEventHL7Norway/CodeSystem/carerelation
  • Include all codes defined in urn:AuditEventHL7Norway/CodeSystem/IPLOStjenestetyper2019CS
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-PurposeOfUse

name: PurposeOfUseVS
title: Valueset used for purpose and purpose-local
description: This valueset is used for coding purpose and purpose-local.
